name: OZ Minerals Limited
description: OZ Minerals Limited was an Australian-based mining company primarily focused on the exploration, development, and operation of copper, gold, and silver assets. Headquartered in Adelaide, South Australia, the company was recognized for its modern approach to mining and commitment to sustainable practices. OZ Minerals operated significant mining projects in Australia and Brazil, emphasizing innovation and collaborative culture. In April 2023, the company was acquired by BHP, a leading global resources company, integrating its assets and operations into the broader BHP portfolio to enhance copper production capabilities.
